message:
test(core-crates): expand test suites across 3 more core crates (+264 tests)

Third batch targeting RaptorQ encoding, persistent storage, and
protocol conformance verification.

Crate-by-crate breakdown:
- fcp-raptorq: 641→721 (+80) — repair ESI, admission controller, OTI roundtrips
- fcp-store: 598→701 (+103) — offline access, quarantine, repair policy, GC roots
- fcp-conformance: 656→737 (+81) — replay windows, cross-zone traversal, COSE tokens

All clippy clean with -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
